sections.title: Write, Preview, and Metadata
sections.markdown:
- **Write** edits the Markdown source.
- **Preview** uses the same render pipeline as the public site.
- **Metadata** controls title, slug, publish date/time, tags, hierarchy, visibility, and publishing status.

sections.title: Save actions
sections.markdown:
- **Save draft** keeps a private working copy.
- **Save** writes the real content item using the selected status.
- **Duplicate** starts a new copy from the current content.
- Revisions are created by real saves, not by draft save or autosave.

sections.title: Slugs and duplicates
sections.markdown:
- A new title can suggest a slug while you are creating content.
- Duplicate slugs are checked before save.
- If a saved item already has an active draft, the composer warns you before you continue.

sections.title: Links, tags, emoji, and smileys
sections.markdown:
- The toolbar inserts common Markdown patterns, including fenced code blocks.
- Internal and external links use dedicated pickers.
- Tags are entered in **Metadata** and autocomplete as you type.
- Markdown underline uses `++text++`.
- Type `:` in the editor to autocomplete emoji shortcodes such as `:blush:`.
- The emoji button opens the full picker, including skin-tone variants.
- Classic smileys such as `:)`, `8-)`, and `:-\` follow the site default and your profile override.
- Use the **Markdown reference** for the full syntax and support list.
